==== file.tsx (0 errors) ====
    declare namespace JSX {
    	interface Element { }
    	interface IntrinsicElements {
    		[s: string]: any;
    	}
    }
    declare var React: any;
    
    // Emit ' word' in the last string
    <div>word <code>code</code> word</div>;
    // Same here
    <div><code>code</code> word</div>;
    // And here
    <div><code /> word</div>;
